g.text: Why Accurate RTT Measurement Is Critical

ul.li: delta: Difference between sample and SRTT
Lost packet not retransmitted for too long
Fast recovery from actual packet loss
Minimizes both spurious and delayed retransmits

text.tspan: // This is per-segment RTT, not just SYN

// Problem: Can't measure RTT for retransmitted
// segments - which ACK corresponds to which send?
// 1. Don't use retransmitted segments for RTT
